description: A pair of conjoined (either glued together or never separated in the first place) tax receipts related to a tax farm (ḍamān). Dated: 25 Jumādā II 524 AH = 5 June 1130 CE. (Each receipt also mentions the year 523 in the main text.) With registration marks in different hands, referencing Dīwān al-Ishrāf. Reused on verso for columns densely packed with Greek/Coptic numerals. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
